approvalStep.description: assign to Director for above 25k for Sr.Manager

entryCriteria.formula: (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA RO / Manager (USA)')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false&& CC_CheckAmount__c>25000)

approvalStep.label: Level 1.0
approvalStep.name: Level_1_0

entryCriteria.formula: OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=0), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false&&CC_CheckAmount__c>500), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))&& ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false&&CC_CheckAmount__c>1500), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Operation Head - USA')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>5000),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA Sr Professional - USA')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>10000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Area Manager')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=2500&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Area Manager')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'CRM')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA RO / Manager (USA)')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>0))
(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Level3 Agent'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Finance Manager - USA'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=25000&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted'))

approvalStep.description: assign to director for above 25k for Sr.Professional

entryCriteria.formula: CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'FCA Sr Professional - USA') && CC_CheckAmount__c > 25000 &&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted')

approvalStep.label: Level 2.0
approvalStep.name: Level_2_0

entryCriteria.formula: OR((OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false&&CC_CheckAmount__c>1500),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >5000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Operation Head - USA')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >10000), (OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA Sr Professional - USA')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >0),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Area Manager')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=5000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'CRM')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=5000), (OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Level3 Agent'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Operation Head'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA Sr Professional - USA'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c >25000&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')))

approvalStep.description: Assign to Director for above 25k for Operation Manager

entryCriteria.formula: CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Operation Head') && CC_CheckAmount__c > 25000 && CC_CNAUpdate__c==false && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted')

approvalStep.label: Level 3.0
approvalStep.name: Level_3_0

entryCriteria.formula: OR((OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && !(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c > 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c > 10000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Operation Head - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c > 5000), (OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')))) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >5000), (OR( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Specialist'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Supervisor'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Operation Head') ) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 25000 && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted') ) )

approvalStep.description: assign to Director for above 25k amount for supervisors

entryCriteria.formula: CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Supervisor') && CC_CheckAmount__c > 25000 && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted')

approvalStep.label: Level 4.0
approvalStep.name: Level_4_0

entryCriteria.formula: OR( (OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && !(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c > 10000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c > 10000), (OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000 && CC_CNAUpdate__c == true), (OR( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Specialist'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Supervisor') ) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 25000 && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted') ) )

approvalStep.description: assign to Director for above 25K criteria for Advisor and Specialist

entryCriteria.formula: (OR( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Specialist') ) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 25000 && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted') )

approvalStep.label: Level 5.0
approvalStep.name: Level_5_0

entryCriteria.formula: OR( (OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && !(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c > 10000), (OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')))) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000 && CC_CNAUpdate__c == true), (OR( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Specialist'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') ) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 25000 && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted') ) )
CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') && CC_CheckAmount__c > 25000 && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted')

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Junior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c <5000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Senior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c < 5000) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Junior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Senior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Junior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Senior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Top Care Agent - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CNAUpdate__c == true && CC_CheckAmount__c < 1000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 1000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Special Investigation team') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c > 2500) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Top Care Agent - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Special Investigation team') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >=5000) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Top Care Agent - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Special Investigation team') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Special Investigation team') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000) )

OR( (OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && !(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c> 5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c <= 10000), (OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')&&!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')))) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c> 5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c <= 10000 && CC_CNAUpdate__c == true) )
(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && (CC_CheckAmount__c> 5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c <= 10000) && !(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')))

ApprovalProcess.description: ENH-159 - Changed the Approval Process for Recall Check Requests Changes as part of STRY0492357 Changes as part of STRY0503033 Changes as part of STRY0504268 -> Increased the the 1st and 2nd levels of non recall check amount limits for Advisor, Specialist, Supervisor Non Recall Check Request Approval Process
ApprovalProcess.label: Non Recall Check Request Owner USA
